content:
# How to Create AI-Generated Explainer Videos in 2026

Explainer videos are incredibly effective but traditionally expensive. AI tools make them accessible to everyone!

Check out our [[link:/category/Video|Video category]] for more tools.

---

## Step 1: Write Your Script

Start with a clear, concise script. Use [[link:/tools/23|Rytr]] to help draft and refine your explainer script.

**Try Rytr**: {{AFFILIATE_RYTR}}

---

## Step 2: Generate Voiceover

Use [[link:/tools/97|ElevenLabs]] or Murf AI to create a professional voiceover for your script.

### Voiceover Tips
- **Choose the right voice**: Match tone to your brand
- **Adjust pacing**: Don't speak too fast
- **Add emphasis**: Highlight key phrases

**Try ElevenLabs**: {{AFFILIATE_ELEVENLABS}}

---

## Step 3: Create the Video

Use [[link:/tools/51|VEED]] or Synthesia to create visuals that match your voiceover.

### Options for Visuals
- **[[link:/tools/51|VEED]]**: Edit your own footage with AI tools
- **Synthesia**: Use AI avatars to present your content
- **[[link:/tools/201|Pictory]]**: Turn text into animated videos automatically

---

## Step 4: Polish & Export

Use [[link:/tools/79|Descript]] for final audio tweaks and export your finished video.

---

## Our Explainer Video Toolkit

| Step | Tool | Affiliate |
|------|------|-----------|
| Script writing | [[link:/tools/23|Rytr]] | Yes |
| Voiceover | [[link:/tools/97|ElevenLabs]] | Yes |
| Video creation | [[link:/tools/51|VEED]] | No |
| Final edit | [[link:/tools/79|Descript]] | No |

Ready to create your AI explainer video? Start with these tools today!
